sourceText: If you hear the dogs, keep going. If you see the torches in the woods, keep going. If they shout at you, keep going. Don't you stop. Keep going.

On the Sovereignty of Persistence: A distraction is a hunter's weapon. A giant understands the most dangerous moment is the decision to pause in fear; by maintaining your momentum regardless of the noise or threats around you, you outmaneuver your opposition. Focus only on your destination.
Every great dream begins with a dreamer. Always remember, you have within you the strength, the patience, and the passion to reach for the stars and change the world.
Vision requires discipline; the world you desire must first be built in your mind. Believing in your ability to create change fuels the long struggle. Your dream is the blueprint for your impact.
I freed a thousand slaves; I could have freed a thousand more if only they had known they were slaves. Consciousness is the first step to freedom.

The mind is the ultimate prison. We understand that external chains are secondary to internal submission; by awakening others to their own potential and the injustice of their limitations, we initiate monumental change. Free the mind first.

Enduring the monumental psychological pressure of defying her family's wishes for a decade. Facing the terrifying conditions of war-time Scutari and the lifelong physical disability of 'Crimean Fever' that left her bedridden for forty years while she managed a global reform movement.

Transcended the limitations of her gender and her health to become the architect of modern healthcare, proving that data and devotion are an invincible combination. Established a monumental standard for professional nursing, showing that a giant’s impact is found in the systems of care they leave behind.
I attribute my success to this: I never gave nor accepted an excuse. Results are the only monumental metric of a life. Do the work.

On the Sovereignty of Responsibility: Excuses are the nails used to build a house of failure. A giant understands their mission demands unwavering commitment to results; by eliminating the option of failure or justification, you force your mind to find the necessary solution. Own your outcome completely.
Life is a struggle, not a hardship. Victory belongs to the best prepared. Detail is the language of monumental victory.
Success isn't accidental; it's meticulously planned. True compassion lies in mastering the data and logistics of your mission. Be as smart as you are kind.
I do not wish to be a 'Lady with a Lamp.' I wish to be a 'Woman of Action.' Let your deeds be your monumental voice in the world.
